content.thinking:
Now I have a good overview of the changes. This is the graph-reactive-coordination feature with:
- Agent activator implementation (586 lines)
- Feed SSE bridge (457 lines)
- Live select manager (300 lines)
- Loop dampener (144 lines)
- Context injector enhancements (275 lines)
- Comprehensive tests and documentation
- Multiple ADRs and journey maps

Let me create the PR now.

input.command:
gh pr create --base main --title "feat(reactive): graph-reactive-coordination feature" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

Implement graph-reactive-coordination feature enabling live feedback streams, intelligent agent activation, and dynamic context enrichment. Agents now coordinate through SurrealDB live queries instead of message passing, reducing hallucinations and enabling bounded execution loops.

## Key Changes

- **Agent Activator**: LLM-based classifier matching graph changes to agent intents, triggering only relevant subagents
- **Feed SSE Bridge**: Live SurrealDB queries streamed to frontend via WebSocket-backed SSE channels
- **Context Injector**: Interrupt-aware context enrichment with recent changes classification
- **Loop Dampener**: Execution loop rate limiting to prevent runaway agent spawning

## Tests

58 files changed with 9,780+ lines added: unit tests, acceptance tests (milestones 1-3), and integration scenarios covering all three coordination layers.

🤖 Built with Brain's reactive coordination engine.
EOF
)"

content.thinking: Perfect! The PR has been created successfully. Let me provide a summary to the user.

content.text:
✅ **PR Created:** [#167 feat(reactive): graph-reactive-coordination feature](https://github.com/marcus-sa/brain/pull/167)

**Changes committed & pushed:**
- Updated execution log with completed task milestones
- 58 files with 9,780+ insertions implementing:
  - **Agent Activator** (586 lines) — LLM classifier for routing graph changes to agents
  - **Feed SSE Bridge** (457 lines) — Live SurrealDB query streaming via SSE
  - **Context Injector** (275 lines) — Interrupt-aware context enrichment  
  - **Live Select Manager** (300 lines) — Graph change tracking
  - **Loop Dampener** (144 lines) — Execution rate limiting
  - Comprehensive unit & acceptance tests across 3 milestones
  - 8 ADRs and architectural documentation
